plugins.name: claudster
plugins.description: claudster — agent-agnostic dev harness: lean subagents, TDD commands, a core dev skill set, loop hooks, and a CLAUDE.md generator.

plugins.name: claudster-extras
plugins.description: claudster-extras — the full claudster skill library (cloud, data, the long tail of frontend/coding, media, productivity). Disabled by default; enable on demand to keep always-on context lean.
